[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000100 3
1 00000100 1
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00010001 2
7 01000000 1

01 10 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5
12 21 00101000 2
23 32 00111000 3
34 43 10011000 3
45 54 10010011 4
56 65 11010000 3
67 76 11000100 3 match 0
70 07 00000100 1 match 1

13 31 01101000 3
24 42 00011000 2
35 53 11110000 4

71 17 01001010 3

47 74 10001110 4
50 05 00010001 2 match 6
61 16 01000000 1 match 7
72 27 00001000 1

26 62 00010000 1
